title: CUB Digital Reimagined
subtitle: Transforming CUB into India's leading hyper-personalized financial wellness platform.
problem_statement: CUB's current mobile app offers standard banking, lacking proactive financial guidance and engaging personalization for modern Indian users.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for a next-gen banking experience.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and identifying unmet needs.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.insight: Users need assurance their money and data are safe.

pillars.title: Control
pillars.insight: Users want clear oversight and management of finances.

pillars.title: Progress
pillars.insight: Users seek tangible steps towards financial growth.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we make CUB a financial wellness partner?
How might we empower users to achieve financial goals?
How might we integrate AI-driven insights seamlessly?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I want smart tools to manage my money.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy, seeks efficient digital solutions for savings and investments, values convenience and insights.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I need banking that simplifies family finances.
personas.bio: Busy entrepreneur, manages household and business finances, seeks integrated, time-saving financial tools.

insights: Am I making smart financial choices?

points.action: Replace generic quick links with personalized financial goals.
Integrate expense tracking with AI-driven budget recommendations.
points.benefit: Offers actionable insights, simplifies money management.

points.action: Adopt gamification elements for savings and investment challenges.
Enhance 'Daily Expense' to a visual, interactive spending dashboard.
points.benefit: Provides clear overview, aids financial control.

pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from reactive banking to proactive, intelligent financial wellness guidance.
pivot.after: Dynamic, personalized financial companion empowering users.

screens.title: Low-Fi
layout: Bottom Nav (Home, Goals, Insights, Pay, Profile)

annotations.title: Account Overview
annotations.rationale: Consolidate key info, add quick actions for primary account.

annotations.title: Fund Transfer
annotations.rationale: Streamline contact selection, add frequent transfer options.

annotations.title: Bill Payment
annotations.rationale: Integrate banner into a dedicated 'Bills' section with reminders.

data.finding: Available balance masked by default, adds friction.
Icons and button styles vary across sections.
No clear undo option for transfers visible.
